Partner Login

Brand story · since 1956

Seventy years of the same promise.

Rainbow started as a single spice shop in Aurangpura in 1956. Three generations later, the promise hasn't changed — the same taste, every batch — only the discipline behind it has grown.

Founder film · 2:40 (placeholder)

The people behind the pack

Three generations, one standard.

1956

A single spice shop opens in Aurangpura.

1988

First stone-ground blends sold under the Rainbow name.

2005

Dedicated blending unit; hotels become regular buyers.

2018

Batch coding and QC lab introduced.

2026

Full traceability — every pack scans back to its farm lots.

Manufacturing

How a Rainbow batch is made.

01

Source

Raw lots bought at origin mandis — Guntur chilli, Sangli turmeric, Unjha cumin, Idukki pepper — each with a farm region and mandi record.

02

Clean & lab-check

Every lot is machine-cleaned, then lab-checked for moisture, colour value and adulterants before it enters the store.

03

Blend

Recipes are locked in a confidential formula vault. Batches are weighed, ground and blended to the gram — not to a taster's mood.

04

Batch-code & pack

Every pack carries a batch code that traces back to the raw lots inside it. Packed with resealable liners for kitchen life.

Facility photographs and plant-walkthrough film to be added with the client's media pack.

GARAM MASALA ✦KITCHEN KING MASALA ✦CHHOLE MASALA ✦PANEER MASALA ✦RAJMA MASALA ✦SAMBHAR MASALA ✦PAVBHAJI MASALA ✦CHAT MASALA ✦PANI PURI MASALA ✦SAFFRON ✦KESARI MILK MASALA ✦TURMERIC POWDER ✦RED CHILLI POWDER ✦CORIANDER POWDER ✦CUMIN POWDER ✦BLACK PEPPER (WHOLE) ✦CUMIN SEEDS (WHOLE) ✦CORIANDER SEEDS (WHOLE) ✦RED CHILLI (WHOLE) ✦GARAM MASALA ✦KITCHEN KING MASALA ✦CHHOLE MASALA ✦PANEER MASALA ✦RAJMA MASALA ✦SAMBHAR MASALA ✦PAVBHAJI MASALA ✦CHAT MASALA ✦PANI PURI MASALA ✦SAFFRON ✦KESARI MILK MASALA ✦TURMERIC POWDER ✦RED CHILLI POWDER ✦CORIANDER POWDER ✦CUMIN POWDER ✦BLACK PEPPER (WHOLE) ✦CUMIN SEEDS (WHOLE) ✦CORIANDER SEEDS (WHOLE) ✦RED CHILLI (WHOLE) ✦

Questions professional kitchens ask

25kg per blend for direct HORECA supply. Below that, we route you to the nearest distributor so you get local delivery.

Menu-costing ideas, monthly.

One email a month on standardisation, yields and food-cost control. No spam.
